description:
Implement `hx-tag` (T1-20) — 6/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Compact label for categorization, filtering, and selection.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tag/`:
- `index.ts` — re-export
- `hx-tag.ts` — Lit component
- `hx-tag.styles.ts` — CSS with `--hx-*` tokens
- `hx-tag.stories.ts` — Storybook stories
- `hx-tag.test.ts` — Vitest tests

**Props:** `variant` (`default`|`primary`|`success`|`warning`|`danger`), `size` (sm/md/lg), `removable` (boolean), `disabled` (boolean), `pill` (boolean — fully rounded)

**Slots:** default (label text), `prefix` (icon/avatar), `suffix`

**Events:** `hx-remove` (when removable and user clicks remove button)

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `prefix`, `label`, `remove-button`

**ARIA:** When `removable`, the remove button must have `aria-label="Remove [tag text]"`. When `disabled`, `aria-disabled="true"`.

**Reference:** Study `hx-badge` for variant/color token patterns. Follow all conventions.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests pass including remove event, axe-core zero violations, Storybook all variants, CEM accurate, bundle < 5KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-tag — T1-20 Tag/Chip Component
